files.purpose: Complete single-file Sudoku game containing all CSS styles, embedded puzzle data, GameEngine module (board, validation, undo/redo), UIRenderer module (grid, highlighting, overlays), TimerService module (pause/resume), and event handlers
Documentation with usage instructions, feature overview, and how to run the game offline

testCommand: Manual testing: load index.html in browser, verify grid renders, test keyboard/mobile input, verify timer, undo/redo, pause, and completion screen
constraints: Single HTML file containing all code, styles, and puzzle data (NFR-01)
Offline-only operation with no external network requests
Responsive design using native CSS Grid/Flexbox and media queries (NFR-02)
Clear visual states for selected, fixed, invalid, and completed cells
Embedded curated puzzles for easy, medium, and hard difficulties
Timer stops when game is paused and screen goes black (FR-11)
Undo/Redo via command stack as per ADR-003
Content-Security-Policy meta tag for security baseline
